  • All Classes
 

Serialized Form

  • Package com.irurueta.geometry

    • Class com.irurueta.geometry.Accuracy extends Object implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • mAvgSqrtSingularValue

          double mAvgSqrtSingularValue
          Average square root of singular value of decomposed covariance matrix. Can be used to determine the average accuracy on a geomtric figure (i.e. the average semi-axis on an ellipse or an ellipsoid).

        • mConfidence

          double mConfidence
          Confidence of provided accuracy of a point for a value located up to the standard deviation factor distance from the mean. This is expressed as a value between 0 and 1, where 1 indicates a 100% confidence that the real position is within provided accuracy.

        • mCovarianceMatrix

          com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix mCovarianceMatrix
          Covariance matrix representing the accuracy of an estimated position.

        • mMaxSqrtSingularValue

          double mMaxSqrtSingularValue
          Maximum square root of singular value of decomposed covariance matrix. Can be used to determine the largest accuracy on a geometric figure (i.e. the largest semi-axis on an ellipse or an ellipsoid).

        • mMinSqrtSingularValue

          double mMinSqrtSingularValue
          Minimum square root of singular value of decomposed covariance matrix. Can be used to determine the smallest accuracy on a geometric figure (i.e. the shortest semi-axis on an ellipse or an ellipsoid).

        • mSqrtSingularValues

          double[] mSqrtSingularValues
          Square root of singular values of decomposed covariance matrix.

        • mStandardDeviationFactor

          double mStandardDeviationFactor
          Standard deviation factor to account for a given accuracy confidence. Typically a factor of 2.0 will be used, which means that accuracy of a point or measure will be drawn as a geometric figure (either an ellipse in 2D or an ellipsoid in 3D) equal to two times the standard deviation. Assuming a Gaussian distribution this is equivalent to providing a 95.44% of confidence on provided accuracy.

        • mSvdDecomposer

          com.irurueta.algebra.SingularValueDecomposer mSvdDecomposer
          Singular value decomposer to find principal axes of provided covariance matrix.

        • mU

          com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix mU
          Orthonormal matrix representing a rotation after decomposing covariance matrix.

    • Class com.irurueta.geometry.Accuracy2D extends Accuracy implements Serializable

    • Class com.irurueta.geometry.Accuracy3D extends Accuracy implements Serializable

    • Class com.irurueta.geometry.AffineParameters2D extends Object implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • scaleX

          double scaleX
          Horizontal scale.

        • scaleY

          double scaleY
          Vertical scale.

        • skewness

          double skewness
          Skewness factor. If 0.0, horizontal and vertical axes remain orthogonal, otherwise they get slanted.

    • Class com.irurueta.geometry.AffineParameters3D extends Object implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • scaleX

          double scaleX
          Scale on x coordinates.

        • scaleY

          double scaleY
          Scale on y coordinates.

        • scaleZ

          double scaleZ
          Scale on z coordinates.

        • skewnessXY

          double skewnessXY
          Skewness factor between axes x-y. If 0.0, x and y axes remain orthogonal, otherwise they get slanted.

        • skewnessXZ

          double skewnessXZ
          Skewness factor between axes x-z. If 0.0, x and z axes remain orthogonal, otherwise they get slanted.

        • skewnessYZ

          double skewnessYZ
          Skewness factor between axes y-z. If 0.0, y and z axes remain orthogonal, otherwise they get slanted.

    • Class com.irurueta.geometry.AffineTransformation2D extends Transformation2D implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • a

          com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix a
          Linear mapping.

        • translation

          double[] translation
          2D translation to be performed on geometric objects. Translation is specified using inhomogeneous coordinates.

    • Class com.irurueta.geometry.AffineTransformation3D extends Transformation3D implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • a

          com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix a
          Linear mapping.

        • translation

          double[] translation
          2D translation to be performed on geometric objects. Translation is specified using inhomogeneous coordinates.

    • Class com.irurueta.geometry.AxisRotation3D extends Rotation3D implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • mAxisX

          double mAxisX
          x element of axis angle.

        • mAxisY

          double mAxisY
          y element of axis angle.

        • mAxisZ

          double mAxisZ
          z element of axis angle.

        • mTheta

          double mTheta
          angle element of axis angle.

    • Class com.irurueta.geometry.BaseConic extends Object implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • mA

          double mA
          A element of the matrix defining a conic.

        • mB

          double mB
          B element of the matrix defining a conic.

        • mC

          double mC
          C element of the matrix defining a conic.

        • mD

          double mD
          D element of the matrix defining a conic.

        • mE

          double mE
          E element of the matrix defining a conic.

        • mF

          double mF
          F element of the matrix defining a conic.

        • mNormalized

          boolean mNormalized
          Determines whether this instance is already mNormalized.

    • Class com.irurueta.geometry.BaseQuadric extends Object implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • mA

          double mA
          A element of the matrix defining a quadric.

        • mB

          double mB
          B element of the matrix defining a quadric.

        • mC

          double mC
          C element of the matrix defining a quadric.

        • mD

          double mD
          D element of the matrix defining a quadric.

        • mE

          double mE
          E element of the matrix defining a quadric.

        • mF

          double mF
          F element of the matrix defining a quadric.

        • mG

          double mG
          G element of the matrix defining a quadric.

        • mH

          double mH
          H element of the matrix defining a quadric.

        • mI

          double mI
          I element of the matrix defining a quadric.

        • mJ

          double mJ
          J element of the matrix defining a quadric.

        • mNormalized

          boolean mNormalized
          Determines whether this instance is already normalized.

      • Serialized Fields

        • mHi

          P extends Point mHi
          High coordinate values.

        • mLo

          P extends Point mLo
          Low coordinate values.

    • Class com.irurueta.geometry.Ellipse extends Object implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • mCenter

          Point2D mCenter
          Center of ellipse.

        • mRotationAngle

          double mRotationAngle
          Rotation angle.

        • mSemiMajorAxis

          double mSemiMajorAxis
          Semi-major axis length (a).

        • mSemiMinorAxis

          double mSemiMinorAxis
          Semi-minor axis length (b).

    • Class com.irurueta.geometry.Ellipsoid extends Object implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • mCenter

          Point3D mCenter
          Center of ellipse.

        • mRotation

          Rotation3D mRotation
          Rotation.

        • mSemiAxesLengths

          double[] mSemiAxesLengths
          Lengths of all three semi-axes.

    • Class com.irurueta.geometry.EuclideanTransformation2D extends Transformation2D implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • rotation

          Rotation2D rotation
          2D rotation to be performed on geometric objects.

        • translation

          double[] translation
          2D translation to be performed on geometric objects. Translation is specified using inhomogeneous coordinates.

    • Class com.irurueta.geometry.EuclideanTransformation3D extends Transformation3D implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • rotation

          Rotation3D rotation
          3D rotation to be performed on geometric objects.

        • translation

          double[] translation
          3D translation to be performed on geometric objects. Translation is specified using inhomogeneous coordinates.

    • Class com.irurueta.geometry.GeometryException extends Exception implements Serializable

    • Class com.irurueta.geometry.HomogeneousPoint2D extends Point2D implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • mNormalized

          boolean mNormalized
          Determines whether this point is already normalized.

        • mW

          double mW
          Defines the W coordinate of an homogeneous 2D point.

        • mX

          double mX
          Defines the X coordinate of an homogeneous 2D point.

        • mY

          double mY
          Defines the Y coordinate of an homogeneous 2D point.

    • Class com.irurueta.geometry.HomogeneousPoint3D extends Point3D implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • mNormalized

          boolean mNormalized
          Determines whether this point is already normalized.

        • mW

          double mW
          Defines the W coordinate of an homogeneous 2D point.

        • mX

          double mX
          Defines the X coordinate of an homogeneous 2D point.

        • mY

          double mY
          Defines the Y coordinate of an homogeneous 2D point.

        • mZ

          double mZ
          Defines the Z coordinate of an homogeneous 2D point.

    • Class com.irurueta.geometry.InhomogeneousPoint2D extends Point2D implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • mX

          double mX
          Defines the X coordinate of an inhomogeneous 2D point.

        • mY

          double mY
          Defines the Y coordinate of an inhomogeneous 2D point.

    • Class com.irurueta.geometry.InhomogeneousPoint3D extends Point3D implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • mX

          double mX
          Defines the X coordinate of an inhomogeneous 2D point.

        • mY

          double mY
          Defines the Y coordinate of an inhomogeneous 2D point.

        • mZ

          double mZ
          Defines the Z coordinate of an inhomogeneous 2D point.

    • Class com.irurueta.geometry.InvalidPinholeCameraIntrinsicParametersException extends GeometryException implements Serializable

    • Class com.irurueta.geometry.InvalidRotationMatrixException extends GeometryException implements Serializable

    • Class com.irurueta.geometry.KDTree.BoxNode extends Box<P extends Point> implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • mDau1

          int mDau1
          Position of 1st daughter node in the list of nodes of a tree.

        • mDau2

          int mDau2
          Position of 2nd daughter node of a tree.

        • mMom

          int mMom
          Position of mother node in the list of nodes of a tree.

        • mPtHi

          int mPtHi
          High index of list of points inside this box. mPtLo and mPtHi define the range of points inside the box.

        • mPtLo

          int mPtLo
          Low index of list of points inside this box. mPtLo and mPtHi define the range of points inside the box.

    • Class com.irurueta.geometry.Line2D extends Object implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • mA

          double mA
          Parameter A of a line.

        • mB

          double mB
          Parameter B of a line.

        • mC

          double mC
          Parameter C of a line.

        • mNormalized

          boolean mNormalized
          Indicates if line is normalized or not.

    • Class com.irurueta.geometry.Line3D extends Object implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • mPlane1

          Plane mPlane1
          1st plane forming this 3D line.

        • mPlane2

          Plane mPlane2
          2nd plane forming this 3D line.

    • Class com.irurueta.geometry.MatrixRotation3D extends Rotation3D implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • internalMatrix

          com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix internalMatrix
          Internal matrix containing rotation using inhomogeneous coordinates. This matrix will be square, 3x3, orthogonal and will have determinant equal to one.

    • Class com.irurueta.geometry.MetricTransformation2D extends EuclideanTransformation2D implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • scale

          double scale
          Scale factor. Negative values mean that objects get reversed. Values greater than 1.0 means that objects get enlarged and values between 0.0 and 1.0 means that objects get reduced.

    • Class com.irurueta.geometry.MetricTransformation3D extends EuclideanTransformation3D implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • scale

          double scale
          Scale factor. Negative values mean that objects get reversed. Values greater than 1.0 means that objects get enlarged and values between 0.0 and 1.0 means that objects get reduced.

    • Class com.irurueta.geometry.NoIntersectionException extends GeometryException implements Serializable

    • Class com.irurueta.geometry.NonSymmetricMatrixException extends GeometryException implements Serializable

    • Class com.irurueta.geometry.NotAvailableException extends GeometryException implements Serializable

    • Class com.irurueta.geometry.NotEnoughVerticesException extends GeometryException implements Serializable

    • Class com.irurueta.geometry.NotSupportedException extends GeometryException implements Serializable

    • Class com.irurueta.geometry.ParallelPlanesException extends GeometryException implements Serializable

    • Class com.irurueta.geometry.ParallelVectorsException extends GeometryException implements Serializable

    • Class com.irurueta.geometry.PinholeCamera extends Camera implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • mCameraCenter

          Point3D mCameraCenter
          Camera center after decomposition.

        • mCameraRotation

          Rotation3D mCameraRotation
          3D rotation of the camera after decomposition.

        • mCameraSignFixed

          boolean mCameraSignFixed
          Boolean indicating whether camera sign has been fixed (it is 1.0). When camera sign is negative, cheirality is reversed, hence it cannot be correctly determined whether points are located in front or behind the camera.

        • mInternalMatrix

          com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix mInternalMatrix
          Internal matrix defining this camera.

        • mIntrinsicParameters

          PinholeCameraIntrinsicParameters mIntrinsicParameters
          Intrinsic parameters of the camera after decomposition.

        • mNormalized

          boolean mNormalized
          Boolean indicating whether this camera has already been normalized. Normalization can help to increase numerical accuracy on camera computations.

    • Class com.irurueta.geometry.PinholeCameraIntrinsicParameters extends Object implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • mInternalMatrix

          com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix mInternalMatrix
          Internal matrix defining the intrinsic parameters of a camera.

    • Class com.irurueta.geometry.Plane extends Object implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • mA

          double mA
          Parameter A of a plane.

        • mB

          double mB
          Parameter B of a plane.

        • mC

          double mC
          Parameter C of a plane.

        • mD

          double mD
          Parameter D of a plane.

        • mNormalized

          boolean mNormalized
          Defines whether the plane is already normalized or not.

    • Class com.irurueta.geometry.Point2D extends Object implements Serializable

    • Class com.irurueta.geometry.Point3D extends Object implements Serializable

    • Class com.irurueta.geometry.Polygon2D extends Object implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • mTriangles

          List<Triangle2D> mTriangles
          List containing triangles found after triangulating this polygon. Initially this list will be null until triangulation is done.

        • mTriangulated

          boolean mTriangulated
          Boolean indicating whether polygon has already been triangulated.

        • mTriangulatorMethod

          TriangulatorMethod mTriangulatorMethod
          Method to do triangulation.

        • mVertices

          List<Point2D> mVertices
          List containing vertices of this polygon. Each vertex is a 2D point.

    • Class com.irurueta.geometry.Polygon3D extends Object implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • mTriangles

          List<Triangle3D> mTriangles
          List containing triangles found after triangulating this polygon. Initially this list will be null until triangulation is done.

        • mTriangulated

          boolean mTriangulated
          Boolean indicating whether polygon has already been triangulated.

        • mTriangulatorMethod

          TriangulatorMethod mTriangulatorMethod
          Method to do triangulation.

        • mVertices

          List<Point3D> mVertices
          List containing vertices of this polygon. Each vertex is a 3D point.

    • Class com.irurueta.geometry.ProjectiveTransformation2D extends Transformation2D implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • normalized

          boolean normalized
          Indicates whether internal matrix is normalized.

        • t

          com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix t
          Internal 3x3 matrix containing transformation.

    • Class com.irurueta.geometry.ProjectiveTransformation3D extends Transformation3D implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • normalized

          boolean normalized
          Indicates whether internal matrix is normalized.

        • t

          com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix t
          Internal 4x4 matrix containing transformation.

    • Class com.irurueta.geometry.Quaternion extends Rotation3D implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • mA

          double mA
          Value corresponding to real numbers basis.

        • mB

          double mB
          Value corresponding to basis i.

        • mC

          double mC
          Value corresponding to basis j.

        • mD

          double mD
          Value corresponding to basis k.

        • mNormalized

          boolean mNormalized
          Indicates whether quaternion is normalized or not.

    • Class com.irurueta.geometry.Rectangle extends Object implements Serializable

        • mBottomRight

          Point2D mBottomRight
          Bottom right coordinate of rectangle.

        • mTopLeft

          Point2D mTopLeft
          Top left coordinate of rectangle.

          Private member containing amount of rotation expressed in radians.

          3rd vertex of this triangle.
